title: Sleep Reminder
description: A simple mod that gently reminde you to sleep when night falls
body:
# Sleep Reminder
**Stop spamming your bed.**

Sleep Reminder sends you a notification the exact moment the game allows you to sleep. This helps you skip the night instantly, avoid Phantom spawns, and save time without guessing.

**Features:**
* **Precise:** Notifies you exactly when the sun sets.
* **Client-Side:** Works on any server or singleplayer world.
* **Configurable:** Customize the message position in the settings.

![in game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd458f8e82f92c5f452c5102983fb35c2a820de8_0.webp)
